entities.name: Nafisa Poonawala
entities.context: Friend, thought partner, and early adopter of V's Zo workflows. In liminal career/life phase with recent diabetes diagnosis at age 32.

entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system and Zo/N5OS workflows that Nafisa is testing.

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: V's AI system/workflows that Nafisa uses and provides feedback on.

entities.name: N5OS
entities.context: V's operating system that Nafisa is curious about using to amplify her work.

entities.name: Stakeholder Intelligence
entities.context: Framework for documenting key people in V's network with psychological profiles and leverage points.

entities.name: Low-friction design
entities.context: Design constraint derived from Nafisa's health and capacity constraints requiring emotionally considerate systems.

entities.name: Onboarding flows
entities.context: System onboarding processes that Nafisa serves as a real-world pilot for.

entities.name: Persona configurations
entities.context: Part of the system ergonomics Nafisa helps test as a non-technical user.

entities.name: Diabetic-range labs diagnosis
entities.context: Recent health event at age 32 that triggered identity dissonance despite strong historical self-care.

relationships.context: Friend and thought partner relationship with high-bandwidth feedback exchange.
Early adopter of V's Zo workflows.
Curious about using N5OS to amplify her work but doesn't want to become a full-time system maintainer.
Her health and capacity constraints force designs that are low-friction and emotionally considerate.
Serves as real-world pilot for onboarding flows as a non-technical power user.
Framework V uses to document key people with profiles and leverage points.
Design constraint that shapes how N5OS should be built for non-technical users.
